description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized zanidatamab for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic HER2-positive (IHC3+) biliary tract cancer (BTC) previously treated with at least one prior line of systemic therapy.

contributions.description: On 2025-07-03, the EMA approved Ziihera (zanidatamab) for the treatment of adult patients with unresectable locally advanced or metastatic HER2-positive (IHC3+) biliary tract cancer (BTC) previously treated with at least one prior line of systemic therapy.

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
